response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and a passion for open-source projects, but his experience is heavily weighted toward web and mobile technologies (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than the C++ and industrial automation focus required for this role. While he has some C/C++ exposure (e.g., National Instruments, Sound Position Server), it is not recent or deeply aligned with the role's core competencies like multi-threading, message brokers, or IEC 62443 security standards. His entrepreneurial and mentorship background is a plus, but the technical fit is partial.
strengths: Diverse technical background with exposure to multiple languages (C++, D, JavaScript) and domains (web, mobile, embedded, IoT).
Strong open-source contributions and mentorship experience, indicating leadership and collaboration skills.
Proven ability to work in agile environments and optimize systems (e.g., low-latency apps at Sociomantic, pricing optimizations at Optilyz).
concerns: Limited recent or in-depth experience with C++ and STL, which are core to the role.
No explicit experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL).
Most recent work focuses on TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure, diverging from the role's on-premises/cloud automation requirements.
